name: Linguist
summary: You have studied languages and codes, gaining the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have studied languages and codes, gaining the following benefits:

items: Increase your Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You learn three languages of your choice.

You can ably create written ciphers. Others can't decipher a code you create unless you teach them, they succeed on an Intelligence check (DC equal to your Intelligence score + your proficiency bonus), or they use magic to decipher it.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
